message:
Add module resolver probe_sequence serde round-trip tests

Three new tests for the probe_sequence field added in the previous
session:

- resolved_module_serde_roundtrip_preserves_probe_sequence: verifies
  that a resolution through workspace lookup produces the expected
  probe sequence ["/app/lib", "/app/lib.mjs"] and survives JSON
  serialization.

- resolved_module_serde_omits_empty_probe_sequence: confirms that
  an empty probe_sequence is omitted from serialized JSON via the
  skip_serializing_if annotation, and correctly restores as Vec::new().

- resolution_outcome_serde_roundtrip_preserves_probe_trace: end-to-end
  test resolving an external module ("left-pad") through the full
  resolve() path and verifying the outcome survives JSON round-trip.

Also reformats the resolve() method's destructuring for line length.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
